panels.description: How much work is entering each queue?
panels.title: Queue Ingress Throughput by Tier

panels.description:
Positive = backlog growing

Zero = workers keeping up

Negative = backlog draining

targets.expr:
sum by (tier) (
  rate(queue_ingress_total[1m])
)
-
sum by (tier) (
  rate(processed_requests_total[1m])
)

panels.description: Shows whether workers are draining queues as fast as jobs arrive.

panels.description: Shows whether one tier is getting slower processing than another tier.

panels.description: Shows actual processing share between VIP and Free traffic.
panels.title: Processed Traffic Share by Tier

panels.description:
Shows how much longer Free waits compared with VIP.

positive = Free waits longer than VIP

near zero = similar wait time

negative = VIP waits longer than Free, which is bad for QoS
panels.title: Free - VIP Queue Wait Gap

panels.description:
1 = queue has jobs but no jobs are being processed
0 = no starvation signal
